occupation: GM of Platform & Partner Strategy at Lumo Digital Outdoor
summary:
DOOH | pDOOH | Ad tech | Media & Sales Strategy

📚 Helping advertisers understand the capabilities of DOOH & pDOOH
🦾 Transforming the way brands buy DOOH
🔍 Building the world's most transparent & innovative DOOH network
☎️ Available to talk billies

experiences.company: Out of Home Media Association Aotearoa
experiences.title: Secretary & Executive Board Member
Agency Account Director
experiences.description: LUMO is New Zealand’s only nationwide premium pure-play digital outdoor media network and is committed to establishing higher standards in innovation, accountability, transparency and digital creativity across the outdoor media sector. Our single-minded purpose provides clarity underpinned by a passion to always strive to be better. We are independent, free to explore the world and seek out new ideas and technologies. We are positive disruptors, asking the questions, testing the boundaries with the single intent of helping advertisers access the many untapped advantages of digital outdoor advertising.
